description: Upgraded UI designs incorporating Super Individual pipeline features
changes: 4-tab navigation (Chat, Assets, Status, Settings) instead of 5-tab
Conversational chat interface with embedded task cards
9-step pipeline stepper (Bootstrap, Index, Clarify, Intent, Plan, Code, Review, Test, Knowledge)
Interactive clarification cards with option buttons
Plan approval cards with approve/reject actions
Status monitoring dashboard with resource utilization

screens.title: 对话界面 - 流水线集成
screens.description: Chat-centric interface with embedded pipeline stepper, code index summary, event timeline, clarification cards, plan approval cards, and test results

screens.title: 任务详情 - 9步流水线
screens.description: Task detail view with 9-step pipeline stepper, real-time log console, file change preview, and agent status

screens.title: 状态监控 - 系统仪表盘
screens.description: System monitoring dashboard with active tasks, statistics, resource utilization, recent events, and health indicators
